use_cases: Primary action trigger for starting user flows or processes
Call-to-action button for SaaS dashboards and landing pages
Animated navigation or menu trigger buttons
Interactive form submission or confirmation button
Visual indicator for multi-step workflows or onboarding flows
ai_summary: Tom_ui Flow Button is an animated button component featuring a distinctive flowing SVG border animation that creates a dynamic, eye-catching visual effect. The component supports three size variants (sm, default, lg) and customizable border colors, making it ideal for creating engaging CTAs in SaaS applications, e-commerce checkouts, and interactive dashboards. Uses Radix UI Slot for composition and includes smooth animations triggered on hover.
